prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: runtime combat effect sprite for a tactics game
Primary request: create The Order Breacher Strike effect
Subject: a sweeping ivory-gold slash crescent with an ecclesiastical spark burst and restrained brass-crimson embers
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D effect sprite, moody post-apocalyptic tactics look with late-90s strategy RPG readability
Composition/framing: single centered effect shape, tight bounds, designed to read when downscaled to a 320x320 runtime asset and shown around 70 to 110 px in battle
Lighting/mood: warm ceremonial flare, bright center, controlled falloff, not overexposed
Color palette: ivory, pale gold, brass, restrained crimson
Constraints: transparent background, no scenery, no text, no border, no weapon handle, no character, no floor, no vignette, no black backdrop, no oversized empty padding
Avoid: photorealism, glossy 3D, anime FX, soft blurry smoke cloud, UI icon styling

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: runtime combat effect sprite for a tactics game. Primary request: create The Order Cautery Charge effect. Subject: a focused amber cautery burst with a white-hot surgical core, circular pressure bloom, scorched filament arcs, and disciplined medic heat, but no healing symbol and no cross iconography. Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D effect sprite, moody post-apocalyptic tactics look with late-90s strategy RPG readability. Composition/framing: single centered impact burst, tight bounds, designed for a 320x320 runtime asset. Lighting/mood: intense cautery flash, contained heat, precise and aggressive, not benevolent. Color palette: amber, orange, ivory, ember red, small brass sparks. Constraints: transparent background, no scenery, no text, no border, no character, no floor, no vignette, no black backdrop, no oversized empty padding, no cross, no medical emblem, no religious sigil, no plus sign. Avoid: healing read, full fireball, photorealism, glossy 3D, anime FX, smoky explosion cloud.
